specific_location: Off biking trail about 200 yds south of Mineral Avenue on the South Platte River aka as Mary Greenway Greenbelt and South Platte Park.
description: I have a photo. Can I submit the photo.  This information was submitted to eBird on the day of sighting. I just learned of CBRC.Behaviors: Bird had been sighted a few days earlier that date submitted here flying with a Black-Crowned Night Heron adult on eastern lake at S. Platte Park. It was too far away for me to obtain a detailed photo. On the day the detailed photo was taken the YCNH was seen again with a BCNH adult on the South Platte River. It was a fairly secluded spot. Joe Roller and several other birders tried to find this bird again but I don't there were additional reported sitings, on eBird at least.Call: NonePlumage: Juvenile
